mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN sys_menu m ON m.id = rm.menu_id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != ''
SELECT r.role_key FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
